---

# .gitignore Brainstorm Template

Template for generating initial .gitignore from brainstorming session data.

## Usage

Load this template during Phase 7 Step 7.7. Minimal customization needed.

---

## Template Content

```gitignore
# DevForgeAI Project .gitignore
# Generated by devforgeai-brainstorming skill

# =============================================================================
# Dependencies
# =============================================================================
node_modules/
__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.pyo
.venv/
venv/
env/
.eggs/
*.egg-info/

# =============================================================================
# Build Outputs
# =============================================================================
dist/
build/
out/
target/
*.exe
*.dll
*.so
*.dylib

# =============================================================================
# IDE & Editor
# =============================================================================
.idea/
.vscode/
*.swp
*.swo
*~
.project
.classpath
.settings/

# =============================================================================
# OS Files
# =============================================================================
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
desktop.ini

# =============================================================================
# Environment & Secrets
# =============================================================================
.env
.env.local
.env.*.local
*.local
secrets/
credentials/

# =============================================================================
# Logs
# =============================================================================
logs/
*.log
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*

# =============================================================================
# Test & Coverage
# =============================================================================
.coverage
htmlcov/
.pytest_cache/
.tox/
.nox/
coverage/
*.cover
.nyc_output/

# =============================================================================
# DevForgeAI Artifacts
# =============================================================================
# Keep specs, ignore temporary files
devforgeai/specs/brainstorms/*.checkpoint.json

# =============================================================================
# Project-Specific (customize as needed)
# =============================================================================
# Add project-specific ignores below this line

```

---

## Customization Notes

The template provides sensible defaults for most projects. After generation:

1. **Review technology stack** - Add language-specific ignores if needed
2. **Add project-specific paths** - Custom build outputs, data directories
3. **Check secrets** - Ensure all sensitive files are covered
